gradeSeparatedCrossings.note: Phase 2A preserves bridge/tunnel as structureType but does not yet planarize or grade-separate visual crossings without shared vertices.

intersectionsNotConnected.note: Visual crossings without an exact shared vertex remain disconnected. No proximity stitching.

limitations: Junctions are exact shared-vertex matches only.
Grade-separated crossings are tagged via structureType but not fully modeled in the graph.
Access classes are inferred from NSTDB descriptions; motorized_verified requires future field/source confirmation.
motorized_unknown tracks are packed but should not be silently treated as legal.
